entry.title: YOUNG RICH MIGHTY II
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 2199.00

260 GSM. Premium Heavyweight Fabric. High-Detail Puff Print Front & Back. Gender-Neutral. Relaxed Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Exclusive YRM Limited Edition.

This 260 GSM premium T-shirt from the exclusive YRM limited-edition collection is designed to make a bold, unmistakable statement. Crafted from heavyweight fabric, it offers a structured yet breathable feel that delivers all-day comfort with a strong streetwear presence. The front and back feature intricately detailed “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” artwork executed in high-definition puff print, creating a striking raised texture that adds depth, dimension, and a premium visual impact. Designed for those who stand out effortlessly, this piece blends luxury aesthetics with everyday wearability. Combed and bio-washed for superior softness and long-lasting durability, it maintains its shape and finish over time while elevating your wardrobe with a powerful identity.

Care Guide

Machine wash inside out with similar colors using cold water. Avoid bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve fabric quality and puff print detailing. Do not iron directly on the prints. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

260 GSM premium heavyweight fabric for a structured, high-end feel. Relaxed, gender-neutral fit designed for statement streetwear. High-detail “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” puff print on both front and back for elevated texture and depth. Exclusive YRM limited-edition release for a distinctive look. Combed and bio-washed fabric for enhanced softness, durability, and long-term shape retention.

entry.title: D'OR SAINT - Ltd. Ed.
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1599.00

240 GSM. Premium Fabric. Cropped Ringer Design. Embroidered Front Detail. 100% Combed Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Regular-Fit Cropped Silhouette. Limited Edition (100 Pieces). Combed & Bio-washed.

This exclusive 240 GSM cropped ringer T-shirt from Drip Studios is crafted to deliver a refined balance of vintage inspiration and modern luxury. Designed with signature contrast ringer trims on the neckline and sleeves, it features a clean cropped silhouette with a relaxed waist that offers effortless structure and comfort. The front is elevated with a finely embroidered detail that adds a subtle yet premium statement without overpowering the minimal aesthetic. Made from high-grade combed and bio-washed cotton, the fabric feels exceptionally soft, breathable, and durable for everyday wear. Strictly limited to only 100 pieces, this piece is designed for those who appreciate exclusivity, precision, and timeless streetwear luxury.

Products in lighter shades (such as white or off-white) are not eligible for return or exchange due to the high risk of stains, discoloration, or signs of use during handling or trial. Customers are advised to review product details carefully before placing an order for these colors.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and preserve the embroidery. Avoid harsh detergents or bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the structure. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the fabric and embroidery finish.

Core Features

240 GSM premium cotton fabric delivering a structured yet comfortable feel. Cropped ringer silhouette with contrast neckline and sleeve trims for a timeless aesthetic. Finely embroidered front detail adding a subtle luxury statement. Regular-fit cropped design with a relaxed waist for balanced structure and movement. Gender-neutral silhouette suitable for diverse body types. Soft, breathable combed cotton ensures all-day comfort. Bio-washed finish for enhanced softness and long-term durability. Exclusively limited to only 100 pieces.

entry.title: YOUNG RICH MIGHTY
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 2199.00

260 GSM. 100% French Terry Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Relaxed Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Premium Puff & Screen Print. Exclusive Limited Edition.

This 260 GSM French terry cotton T-shirt is crafted to combine premium comfort with bold, statement-driven design. Built from heavyweight French terry cotton, the fabric delivers a smooth, structured feel while remaining breathable and durable for all-day wear. Designed as an exclusive limited-edition release, the front features the striking “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” artwork executed in a combination of premium puff and screen printing for layered texture and depth. The back carries the signature 09 brand number in the same high-quality print finish, creating a cohesive, standout identity from every angle. Combed and bio-washed for long-lasting softness and shape retention, this tee is made for those who move with confidence and presence.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors using cold water. Avoid bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain print texture and fabric quality. Do not iron directly on the prints. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

260 GSM French terry cotton for a premium heavyweight structure. Relaxed, gender-neutral fit designed for everyday statement wear. Front “YOUNG RICH MIGHTY” artwork in premium puff and screen print combination. Back brand number 09 executed in matching high-quality print finish. Exclusive limited-edition design for elevated street presence. Combed and bio-washed fabric for enhanced softness, durability, and long-term shape retention.

entry.title: RESILIENCE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: dripcult
Price: 1699.00

260 GSM. 100% French Terry Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Boxy-Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Piping Work & Embroidery.

This 260 GSM boxy-fit T-shirt is designed for a strong, confident everyday statement with premium comfort at its core. Crafted from 100% French terry cotton, it offers a soft yet substantial feel with excellent breathability and durability. The design is elevated with refined piping work across the shoulders and front, adding depth and structure to the silhouette. Premium embroidery detailing on both the front and back enhances the overall craftsmanship, delivering a clean yet bold aesthetic. Finished with combed and bio-washed fabric, this tee ensures lasting softness, shape retention, and all-day wearability.

Products in lighter shades (such as white or off-white) are not eligible for return or exchange due to the high risk of stains, discoloration, or signs of use during handling or trial. Customers are advised to review product details carefully before placing an order for these colors.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and embroidery detailing. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to avoid shrinkage. Do not iron directly on embroidery. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

260 GSM French terry cotton for a premium, heavyweight feel. Boxy fit for a relaxed and modern silhouette. Piping work across shoulders and front for elevated detailing. Front and back embroidery for a refined, high-quality finish. Gender-neutral design suitable for diverse body types. Combed and bio-washed fabric for superior softness, durability, and long-lasting comfort.

entry.title: HOLY FLEX
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: reign
Price: 1869.00

MALE MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M TEE.

  • 280 GSM premium French terry fabric for a substantial and durable feel.
  • Oversized fit with full raglan sleeves for relaxed comfort and easy movement.
  • Classic black and white color blocking with a crisp white body and deep black sleeves.
  • Low-density front print featuring subtle script “Drip Studios” branding.
  • Vertical “Drip Studios” screen print on sleeves for a bold yet minimal look.
  • Impactful Christ face graphic on the back with low-density print for a softer, artistic texture.
  • Piping work over the armhole area enhances structure and detailing.
  • Combed and bio-washed finish for smooth texture and long-lasting quality.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the tee inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve fabric quality and print finish.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to avoid shrinkage.
  • Store in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or fabric damage.

Core Features

  • Tee with 280 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a premium, substantial feel.
  • Oversized fit suitable for both men and women.
  • Unisex article designed for versatile styling.
  • Soft, breathable fabric ensures all-day comfort.

entry.title: RULES BREAKER I - WAFFLE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1899.00

240 GSM. Premium Waffle Fabric. Oversized Fit with Raglan Sleeves. Front Embroidery & Back Silicone Print. Gender-Neutral. Combed & Bio-washed.

This oversized 240 GSM waffle T-shirt from Drip Studios is built for comfort with a refined edge. Designed with raglan sleeves for enhanced mobility and a relaxed drape, it delivers a super-comfy yet decent silhouette. The front features a clean embroidered “Rules Breaker” logo, keeping it minimal and premium, while the back makes a bold statement with a high-quality silicone print reading “Rules Breaker.” Crafted from combed and bio-washed cotton waffle fabric, this tee offers breathability, texture, and lasting softness—perfect for elevated everyday wear.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and detailing. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the fabric and prints.

Core Features

240 GSM waffle fabric for a textured, premium feel. Oversized fit for a relaxed and comfortable silhouette. Raglan sleeves for improved movement and fit. Front embroidered logo with back silicone print for durability and style. Unisex design suitable for multiple body types. Combed and bio-washed cotton for superior softness and long-la

entry.title: CODE-9 FLAGGED
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: oversized-tees
Price: 1649.00

260 GSM. Premium Fabric with Raglan Sleeves. Front & Back Print. 100% French Terry Cotton. Gender-Neutral. Boxy Fit. Combed & Bio-washed.

This premium 260 GSM T-shirt from Drip Studios is designed for those who like their style bold and unapologetic. Featuring classic raglan sleeves, it delivers enhanced comfort, mobility, and a distinct athletic-inspired silhouette. The front showcases the Drip Studios brand print with a clean, confident presence, while the back makes a powerful statement with the phrase “Are You Flagged and Certified Lover.” Crafted from high-quality French terry cotton, this tee offers durability, breathability, and all-day comfort. CODE 9 is made for individuals who wear their mindset as confidently as their style.

Care Guide

Machine wash the t-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and print longevity. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to avoid shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the fabric and prints.

Core Features

260 GSM fabric for a structured, premium feel. Raglan sleeves for improved comfort and a relaxed yet refined fit. Boxy, oversized silhouette suitable for both men and women. Unisex design crafted to complement diverse body types. Soft, breathable French terry cotton ensures lasting comfort and durability.

entry.title: CERTIFIED LOVER
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: dripcult
Price: 1649.00

260 GSM. 100% French Terry Cotton. Gender- Neutral. Boxy-Fit. Combed & Bio-washed. Embroidery work front/back.

This 260 GSM black oversized T-shirt is crafted to offer a bold, streetwear-inspired aesthetic with premium details. Designed with a white cloth lining running from top to bottom, as well as from the front neck to the shoulder area, it brings a fresh touch to your look. The front features an embroidered logo, adding a touch of sophistication and an elevated vibe to the piece. On the back, the embroidered “Certified Lover” (that too in embroidery) print adds an extra layer of exclusivity. Perfect for those who appreciate luxury and street style, this T-shirt combines comfort, durability, and high-end craftsmanship.

Care Guide

Machine wash the t-shirt inside out with like colors. Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the fabric’s integrity. Store the t-shirt in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.

Core Features

T-shirts with 260 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel. Oversized fit for comfortable and versatile wear by both men and women. Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences. Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow.

entry.title: UNHOLY SAINT ♡
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: hoodies
Price: 2409.00

MALE MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M HOODIE. 420 GSM PIPING WORK OVER SHOULDER, ARMS AND WAIST AREA PREMIUM 100% COTTON MATERIAL EMBROIDERY PRINT FRONT AND BACK (78,000+ embroidery stitches) BAGGY FIT [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS]. COMBED AND BIOWASHED.

Step into elevated streetwear with this 420 GSM super-premium sweatshirt, crafted for comfort, durability, and bold style. Made using combed and bio-washed fabric, it delivers a smooth, soft feel with long-lasting quality. The design features sleek piping work running across the shoulders, arms, and waist, adding a sharp, structured look. Front and back high-density embroidery make a strong statement, showcasing intricate detailing that stands out. With its relaxed fit, this sweatshirt blends effortless vibe with premium construction—perfect for everyday wear or standout street style.

Care Guide

* Machine wash the sweatshirt inside out with like colors. * Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality. * Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage and maintain the fabric’s integrity. * Store the sweatshirt in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.

Core Features

* Sweatshirt with 420 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel. * Baggy fit for comfortable and versatile wear by both men and women. * Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences. * Front pouch pocket for convenient storage and added warmth. * Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow. * Long sleeves and ribbed cuffs and hem provide a snug and stylish fit.
